title: Human-Readable Evidence Rendering
description: Add evidence rendering layer in rt-correlation. Each Evidence value renders to a human-readable line based on its kind/source/attrs. Findings carry rendered evidence strings.
acceptance_criteria: render_evidence_line(ev: &Evidence) -> String function exists in rt-correlation::render
Process evidence renders as: PID 977 top [thread: libuv-worker]
Finding::evidence_rendered is populated by engine after correlation
